stations.name: Closest stations are Fortitude Valley and Bowen Hills

buses.note: Bus routes serve Newstead via Breakfast Creek Road and the Valley arterials.

driving.motorway_access: Story Bridge and Inner City Bypass.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 8 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Walking access to Gasworks and James Street

secondary_state.name: Fortitude Valley State Secondary College or other catchment

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: The Gasworks Newstead is the suburb's premium dining and retail precinct. James Street is within walking distance for additional dining. Howard Smith Wharves nearby.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage with the Riverwalk and Teneriffe ferry connection.

pockets.name: Riverside / Gasworks
pockets.character: Premium apartment stock close to the river and the Gasworks.

pockets.name: Breakfast Creek side
pockets.character: Streets close to the creek and the Breakfast Creek Hotel precinct.

buyer_profile.note: Apartment-led downsizing with the Gasworks lifestyle on the doorstep.
